title: New Generation Jazz Futures 2026
description: New Generation Jazz present Jazz Futures - in collaboration with our partners at AudioActive we're proud to platform a special showcase encompassing the range and diversity of talented young people from across Sussex participating in our unique Jazz Futures programme with special guests from across the spectrum of talent from jazz to hip hop. Expect a full line-up of amazing young musicians playing some specially created collabs with rappers from AudioActive and master beatsmaker Oli Howe and the to explore the the area where jazz meets urban beats to create a dazzling contemporary fusion.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
